title: Copy. Paste. Ship.
desc: No packages to install. No CLI. No config. Just copy the component code and drop it into your project.

title: Tailwind-native
desc: Every component uses Tailwind CSS utility classes. Customize anything by editing class names directly.

title: Dark mode included
desc: Light and dark variants are built into every component.

title: Accessible by design
desc: Components follow WCAG guidelines with proper ARIA roles.

title: Figma kit included
desc: Pixel-perfect Figma kit kept in sync with updates.

title: Weekly updates
desc: New components and templates are added every week.
